pi_items.source: Task setup script and env setup script load the 'bologna_pasubio' directory, which contains real-world traffic data from Bologna, Italy.
Task prompt instructs saving the screenshot to this exact path, and export_result.sh explicitly checks for this file.
Task prompt instructs saving the visualization settings to this exact path, and export_result.sh explicitly checks for this file.
Task prompt instructs running the simulation to at least time step 500. verifier.py and export_result.sh extract the max step and check if it is >= 500.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring the SUMO-GUI using the real-world Bologna Pasubio scenario. The agent must save a screenshot of the speed-colored roads to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/congestion_map.png, export the visualization settings to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/visualization_settings.xml, and run the simulation to at least time step 500. All these paths and values are confirmed by the evaluation scripts and task instructions.
